nonBlockingIssues.description: charge() u128→u64 truncation: silently truncates if intermediate result exceeds u64::MAX. Practically unreachable (requires >208 days per charge tick at weight=1), but a saturating cast would be strictly correct.
SAFETY comment for `unsafe impl Sync` reasoning chain slightly imprecise — explains why Send is needed rather than Sync. Safety claim itself is valid (access serialized by IrqMutex).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Make the TDD exemption for documentation-only changes (SAFETY/AUDIT comments without code changes) more prominent in the kernel-auditor skill procedure. Currently mentioned but could be more visible to avoid workers feeling they need to force-fit TDD for comment-only additions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: thread-lifecycle-audit worker noted the exemption exists but suggested it be more prominent. Minor clarity improvement.
